spec_match.rationale: The token decoder cleanly parses and formats JWT headers, payloads, and signatures, drawing attention to key EVP-mandated claims.

interactive.rationale: Allows custom token pasting and live parsing with dynamic visual warnings for claim values such as expiration.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly supports the Relying Party development perspective by breaking down the structure of the cryptographic proof.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully handles malformed inputs and signature parsing errors, displaying user-facing error logs.

references.rationale: The see also section includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5205725253074944 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Follows the design system layout and variables closely, using monospace typography appropriately for technical layouts.

summary: The token-decoder provides an outstanding inline debugger for EVP JWT claims, rendering warning states when claims like exp are expired, and now satisfies the required ChromeStatus reference invariant.
